channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Suspected abandoned vehicle parked on residential cul-de-sac for over two months, 16th July
item.description:
Hello, I would like to report a vehicle that appears to have been abandoned on a residential cul-de-sac. Registration: AV17 UYJ Location: River Park View, BR6. 0NA The vehicle is parked on the road, not on a private driveway, and has remained in the same location for over two months. It is unsightly, has a negative impact on the appearance of the residential cul-de-sac, and appears to be being used for long term storage rather than normal parking. The vehicle currently has no valid MOT. Could you please investigate whether this vehicle has been abandoned and if any appropriate action can be taken? Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): River Park View, Goddington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped toilet, 16th July
item.description:
Someone dumped a toilet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ledbury Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Littering around Stamford Hill Station / Holmdale Terrace, 16th July
item.description:
Please clean litter on pavements outside stamford hill station and at the top of Holmdale Terrace (Hackney)

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Amhurst Park, Hackney, London

item.title: Corner Hartland /honiton, 16th July
item.description:
Abandoned blue bin needs emptying

item.title: Only half pedestrian buttons work., 16th July
item.description:
Not all pedestrian buttons works. Leading to high danger with shops, schools, care home etc nearby
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 204 - 212, High Street, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned untaxed smart car, 16th July
item.description:
Been here for a few days, unlocked, badly parked and already collecting parking tickets, taking a resident parking space in Navarino Road North. Not taxed apparently

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Navarino Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hartland road, 16th July
item.description:
The whole street hasn’t been swept in weeks.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hartland Road, London

item.title: Outside grovers, 16th July
item.description:
Food bin is seeping and staining pavement. Pavement needs to be cleaned and bin cleaned.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Salusbury Road, London

item.title: Blocking driveway for our van, 16th July
item.description:
Can’t park our van in our driveway properly have to go in by a sharp angle

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mayday Gardens, Kidbrooke

item.title: Mattress dumped, 16th July
item.description:
A double sized mattress has been dumped in Warren Avenue playing fields

item.title: Outside Starbucks, 16th July
item.description:
The bin and surrounding pavement is filthy. Street needs to be occasionally cleaned and bin had stickers and cigarette burns everywhere.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Salusbury Road, London

item.title: Abandoned car, 16th July

item.title: Dumped bed by corner of upland and crebor, 16th July

item.title: Abandoned wheeli bins near Mottingham Station, 16th July
item.description:
Approximately four abandoned wheelie bins near to 186 Court Road SE9 4EW / Station approach. Noted two days ago.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Station Approach Southside, Mottingham

item.title: Flytipping, 16th July
item.description:
Children’s broken bed and mattress been dumped on the street. Been there a couple of weeks now

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plumstead Common Road, Plumstead

item.title: Miscellaneous rubbish dumped on the pavement, 16th July
item.description:
There is a pile of miscellaneous rubbish on the pavement outside 164 Palmers Road. It includes wood and metal. It is causing an obstruction.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Palmers Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement blocked by overgrown vegetation, 16th July
item.description:
Tree shrubbery is now overgrown that cannot get to bus stop or off the bus and continue along the pavement. Totally blocked as shown by this photo.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress abandoned, 16th July
item.description:
A mattress has been abandoned on the sidewalk in front of 8 Linden Grove, SE15 3LF. It has been there for abkjt 3 days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Linden Grove, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pile of rubbish, 16th July
item.description:
This has been dumped by the road on the path and has begun to rot and smell heavily. It is attracting rodents. It is on the corner of Orissa Road by Conway Road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Orissa Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet
